raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The Armed and Prohibited Persons System (APPS) was first deployed in 2006 by the California Department of Justice to monitor individuals who legally purchased or acquired firearms and later became prohibited from owning or possessing them.",
    "APPS is currently the only system of its kind in the United States.",
    "The use of the APPS to locate and disarm prohibited persons helps prevent and reduce incidents of violent crime.",
    "The Gun Violence Reduction Program aims to reduce the number of individuals on the APPS list by increasing resources and capacity for law enforcement.",
    "Sheriff's offices have demonstrated innovative and proactive approaches to investigating and removing firearms from prohibited persons."
  ]
}
```
